title: AIG names Sabra Purtill its permanent CFO
text: AIG Inc. AIG, -2.13% said late Tuesday it has named Sabra Purtill its permanent chief financial officer. Purtill had served as interim CFO since January, the company said.

title: Sabra Purtill Named Permanent CFO of AIG
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--American International Group (NYSE: AIG) today announced that Sabra Purtill, who has served as Interim Chief Financial Officer since January 2023, has been named to the role on a permanent basis, effective immediately. Shane Fitzsimons will step down from his position following a medical leave of absence.
